text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky... Happy birthday! I have a present for you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, thanks! I wonder what. Lemme try and guess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it must be a ten carat diamond, right? Or
maybe my own villa by the lake?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-nooo... I'm sorry! It's actually... a pressed
flower bookmark.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You have that flower hair clip, and you seemed
happy with that flower crown I made you before,
so...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... The crown of daisies. Yeah, I remember
that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was so glad when you smiled and said thank you
for that. It made me feel all nice and warm, like
the sun was shining on me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That look on your face made me so happy. I
figured you must love flowers to give such a big
smile.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...No, you're right. I love flowers. Ignore what I
said before. Sorry.
